evals.expected_output: Run next dev --turbo or set turbopack: true in next.config.js experimental; faster HMR; not all webpack plugins compatible; check turbopack.dev compatibility list before enabling in existing projects

evals.prompt: Build a Docker image with Next.js standalone output
evals.expected_output: Set output: 'standalone' in next.config.js; Dockerfile: COPY .next/standalone ./; COPY .next/static .next/static; COPY public ./public; CMD ['node', 'server.js']; significantly smaller image than full install
Install eslint-config-next; set extends: ['next/core-web-vitals'] in .eslintrc; run next lint in CI; catches Next.js-specific issues: missing Image alt, synchronous script usage, invalid href

evals.prompt: Analyze bundle size in a Next.js project
evals.expected_output: npm install @next/bundle-analyzer; wrap config: withBundleAnalyzer(nextConfig); run ANALYZE=true next build; opens treemap in browser; look for large third-party modules or duplicate dependencies

evals.prompt: Set up CI caching for Next.js .next/cache
evals.expected_output: GitHub Actions: cache: { path: '.next/cache', key: 'nextjs-${{ hashFiles("package-lock.json") }}' }; restores incremental compilation cache; reduces build time significantly on subsequent runs
Set NEXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 as env var in CI config; or run next telemetry disable once; prevents analytics calls during build that can slow CI or cause network errors in restricted environments

should_not_trigger: Vite build configuration for a React SPA
Webpack config for a Create React App project
Gradle build for a Spring Boot application
Docker build for a NestJS microservice
